zh.Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Richmond於1350年出生在英國越可爾卡芙特時，她的父親Richard de Richmond Webb8歲，母親Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster18歲。她於1394年與John Clervaux II在英國越可爾卡芙特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年在英國越可爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Richmond于1350年出生在英国越可爾卡芙特时，她的父亲Richard de Richmond Webb8岁，母亲Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster18岁。她于1394年与John Clervaux II在英国越可爾卡芙特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1408年在英国越可爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Richmond (North Yorkshire). The placename was probably transferred after the Norman Conquest from any of numerous places in France named with Old French riche ‘mighty, strong’ + munt, mont ‘mountain, hill’. Richmond in southwest London received this name only in the reign of Henry VII, in honor of the king, who had been Earl of Richmond until he came to the throne, and is unlikely to be the source of this surname.
occasionally a variant of Richman , with excrescent -d. The two names were probably often confused.

variants.name: Richman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Richeman, either from an unrecorded Old English Rīcmann, or from a pet form of Richard + the hypocoristic suffix -man. The name was sometimes interchangeable with Rickman , especially in recent times.
English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English riche ‘rich, powerful’ + -man. Compare Rich .
English: perhaps a variant of   Richmond  , or vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Richmond was born in 1350, in Croft, Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard de Richmond Webb, was 8 and her mother, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, was 18. She married John Clervaux II in 1394, in Croft, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1408, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Richmond est née en 1350, à Croft, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Richmond Webb, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Clervaux II en 1394, à Croft, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1408, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Richmond 1350 in Croft, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Richmond Webb 8 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster 18. Sie hat 1394 in Croft, Yorkshire, England John Clervaux II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1408 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Richmond è nata il nel 1350 nel Croft, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Richmond Webb, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Clervaux II nel 1394, nel Croft, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1408, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Munkegate, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Richmondが1350年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロフトで生まれた時，父Richard de Richmond Webbは8歳，母Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulsterは18歳であった。1394年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロフトでJohn Clervaux IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1408年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Richmond(이)가 1350년 영국 요르크실르 크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Richmond Webb(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1394년 영국 요르크실르 크로프트에서 John Clervaux II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 영국 요르크실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Richmond nasceu em 1350, em Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Richmond Webb, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Clervaux II em 1394, em Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1408, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Richmond родилась в 1350 г. в местности крофт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Richmond Webb было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Clervaux II в 1394 г. в местности крофт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1408 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Richmond nació en 1350, en Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Richmond Webb, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Clervaux II en 1394, en Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1408, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
